inline_comments: Abstract base interface for voice call providers. Each provider (Telnyx, Twilio, etc.) implements this interface to provide a consistent API for the call manager. Responsibilities: - Webhook verification and event parsing - Outbound call initiation and hangup - Media control (TTS playback, STT listening)
Verify webhook signature/HMAC before processing. Must be called before parseWebhookEvent.
Parse provider-specific webhook payload into normalized events. Returns events and optional response to send back to provider.
Initiate an outbound call. @returns Provider call ID and status
Play TTS audio to the caller. The provider should handle streaming if supported.
Start listening for user speech (activate STT).
Stop listening for user speech (deactivate STT).

Query provider for current call status. Used to verify persisted calls are still active on restart. Must return `isUnknown: true` for transient errors (network, 5xx) so the caller can keep the call and rely on timer-based fallback.

concerns: Multiple concerns detected: database, api, business_logic, logging
